name: io.github.alisaitteke/temporal-mcp
description: MCP server for the Temporal HTTP API. Manage workflows, namespaces, schedules, batch operations, Nexus endpoints, and more from any MCP-compatible IDE. Tool tiers (essential vs all) keep default context lean.

environmentVariables.name: TEMPORAL_ADDRESS
environmentVariables.description: Temporal HTTP API base URL (e.g. http://localhost:8233 for dev server, or your cloud endpoint)

environmentVariables.name: TEMPORAL_NAMESPACE
environmentVariables.description: Default namespace for API calls (defaults to "default" if unset)

environmentVariables.name: TEMPORAL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key when connecting to Temporal Cloud or mTLS-protected endpoints that expect a bearer token

environmentVariables.name: TEMPORAL_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Tool set: "essential" (default, ~11 tools) or "all" for the full HTTP API surface
